programme.desc: Held at the Shanghai Juss International Equestrian Centre, featuring CSI5* show jumping with fences up to 1.60m. programme.title: Main Race -F1 British Grand Prix - 2026
programme.desc: 24 Grand Prix from the Formula 1 Season are live and exclusive only on beIN. All Practices, Qualifiers and Races are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary. The 2026 season will consist of 6 Sprint Races within the 24 weekends.

programme.title: Race 1 - DTM - Norisring Round
programme.desc: The DTM heads to the Norisring in Nuremberg for two races on one of the championship’s most iconic street circuits. The tight layout, heavy braking zones, and short lap create close battles, where qualifying, race strategy, and precision driving are crucial across both races.

programme.title: Brazil vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage

programme.title: Ecuador vs Germany - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Germany have won their two previous encounters with Ecuador - 3-0 in the group stage of the 2006 World Cup and 4-2 in a May 2013 friendly which was played in Boca Raton, Florida. programme.desc: Brazil and Scotland will face each other in the FIFA World Cup for the fifth time. Only Argentina v Netherlands has been played more times since the 1974 edition. programme.title: Czech Republic vs Mexico - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Mexico faced Czechoslovakia at the 1962 World Cup, winning 3-1 in their final group game. This will be their first FIFA World Cup meeting since the split of Czechoslovakia in the early 1990s. Czechia and Mexico’s last meeting came in a February 2000 friendly, in Hong Kong, with Czechia winning 2-1.

programme.title: Ecuador vs Germany - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Germany have won their two previous encounters with Ecuador - 3-0 in the group stage of the 2006 World Cup and 4-2 in a May 2013 friendly which was played in Boca Raton, Florida. Six of Germany’s seven goals against Ecuador have come in the first half, including Lukas Podolski scoring after nine seconds in their last meeting in May 2013.
